dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4202 IS: Mental Health Access and Provider Support Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Barrasso (for himself, Mr. Coons, Mrs. Capito, Ms. Cortez Masto, and Ms. Hassan) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend title XVIII of the Social Security Act to improve access to mental health services under the Medicare program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Mental Health Access and Provider Support Act of 2026.

section.header: Improving access to mental health services under the Medicare program

subsection.text: Section 1833(a)(1) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395l(a)(1)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (F)(ii), by striking 75 percent of the amount determined for payment of a psychologist under clause (L) and inserting 85 percent of the fee schedule amount provided under section 1848;
in subparagraph (EE), by striking 1847A(i)(5)(B) and inserting 1847A(i)(5)(B),; and

in subparagraph (FF), by striking 75 percent of the amount determined for payment of a psychologist under subparagraph (L) and inserting 85 percent of the fee schedule amount provided under section 1848.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to items and services furnished on or after January 1, 2027.
